title: WSP söker en projektledare inom fjärrvärmedistribution
description:
**Job Description**
**Introduktion**
 Power & Energy, en av WSP Sveriges fem sektorer, består av cirka 200 medarbetare. Vi har flera interna nätverk för att dela kunskap och stötta varandra, och en stark vi-känsla genomsyrar vår arbetsmiljö. Vi arbetar tillsammans för att lösa tekniska utmaningar och bemanna uppdrag. Våra huvudsakliga kunder är kommuner, entreprenörer, industrier och exploatörer.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder dig stimulerande arbetsuppgifter där du ges möjlighet att vara en aktiv del av ett ledande globalt företag med stark förankring på den svenska marknaden. Vi arbetar i stora, komplexa uppdrag tillsammans med andra kompetenser och teknikområden inom WSP, likväl som i mindre och mer nischade uppdrag inom våra respektive expertområden. Vi brinner för hållbara samhällen och våra varierande profiler och erfarenheter gör att vi både kompletterar, utvecklar och utmanar varandra. Hållbarhet, professionalitet, arbetsglädje och högt i tak är centrala värdeord för oss, och vi brinner för att skapa hållbara samhällen.
   

  

 Inom Power & Energy finns vår verksamhet
 *Thermal Production & Distribution.* 
 Du kommer tillhöra en grupp, som består av 13 medarbetare lokaliserade i Falun, Uppsala och Stockholm. I din roll kommer du främst arbeta tillsammans med projekteringsledare och andra projektörer i varierande typer av projekt. Gruppen är framförallt ansvariga för projekt som har sin hemvist i mellersta Sverige men även den norska och danska marknaden inom värme-/kyla produktion och distribution.
   

  

 Vi utökar nu vårt team i Stockholm/Uppsala, då vi ser en ökad efterfrågan på våra tjänster från våra kunder. Vi söker dig som är erfaren projektledare med erfarenhet av fjärrvärmedistribution.
   

  

**Ansvarsområde**
 I rollen som Projektledare ansvarar du för att driva och koordinera projekt kopplade till fjärrvärmedistribution. Du leder en grupp med erfarna ingenjörer och samarbetar med specialister från olika teknikområden inom WSP. Du är även en nyckelperson i kundens organisation, där du samordnar olika aktörer vid exempelvis byggnation, reinvesteringar eller andra tekniska förändringar.
   

  

 Just nu befinner vi oss i en tillväxtfas med stor efterfrågan på våra tjänster från våra kunder, och stärker därför vår grupp i Stockholm/Uppsala. Vi söker därför dig som vill vara med och utveckla vår affär, bidra med teknisk expertis och ta en aktiv roll i att forma framtidens energilösningar.
   

  

 Hos WSP får du en utmanande och stimulerande vardag där du kan växa – både som projektledare och som teknisk expert. Vi erbjuder en inkluderande arbetsmiljö med stark laganda och ett brett nätverk av kompetens att luta dig mot.
   

  

 Du kommer vara placerad på vårt huvudkontor i Stockholm, alternativt Uppsala, med goda möjligheter till att jobba hemifrån några dagar i veckan om du vill.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi söker dig som har minst 5 års erfarenhet av projektledning eller en annan ledande position inom fjärrvärmedistribution. Har du erfarenhet från konsultbranschen är det meriterande.
   

  

 Du har god teknisk förståelse, och är van att driva projekt från idé till genomförande.
   

  

 Du är kommunikativ, utåtriktad och har lätt för att skapa förtroende hos både kunder och kollegor. Genom din branscherfarenhet har du troligen ett värdefullt nätverk som du gärna använder för att skapa nya affärer och relationer.
   

  

 Vi arbetar i en global koncern där vi i uppdragen sätter ihop team över landsgränserna så det är viktigt att du besitter mycket goda kunskaper i att kommunicera på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
   

  

**Kontakt**
 Jonathan Norman, Gruppchef fjärrvärme/fjärrkyla, jonathan.norman@wsp.com
   

  

 Anders Månsson, Avdelningschef, anders.mansson@wsp.com
   

  

 Sofie Grettve, Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist, sofie.grettve@wsp.com
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag**
 Urval sker löpande men vi vill senast få in din ansökan 31 augusti 2026. Under sommarperioden och stundande ledighet kan urvalsprocessen komma att dra ut på tiden, varför återkoppling kan dröja något.
   

  

 Kontakt från rekryteringsföretag, CV- och annonssäljare undanbedes.
   

  

**OM WSP I SVERIGE**
 WSP är en av världens ledande teknikkonsulter. Med en enastående bredd av ingenjörer, rådgivare och forskare förenas våra globala talanger för att utveckla lokala lösningar.
   

  

 WSP är verksamma i över 50 länder och har cirka 83 000 medarbetare, eller som vi säger Visionärer. På WSP i Sverige jobbar cirka 3 800 konsulter med att leverera innovativa projekt inom transport, infrastruktur, byggnation, miljö, projektledning, strategisk rådgivning och energi.
   

  

 Följ oss gärna på WSP Sverige (LinkedIn), WSP Sverige (Facebook), eller @wspsweden (Instagram) för en närmare inblick i vår verksamhet samt hur en dag i arbetet kan se ut för våra medarbetare.
   

  

**About Us**
 At
 **WSP** 
 , we exist to shape communities to advance humanity.
   

  

 It’s why we bring people together who are wired to solve complex challenges - engineers, scientists, advisors, and technical experts who are driven by a common passion - to redefine what’s possible and shape what comes next. We are Visioneers.
   

  

 As one of the world’s leading professional services firms, we partner with clients across transportation, infrastructure, environment, buildings, energy, water, mining and metals. We pair deep local knowledge with global insights to pioneer solutions designed to leave a lasting, positive impact.
   

  

 At
 **WSP** 
 , you’ll join a community of brilliant minds that push boundaries every day - applying deep expertise and fuelling innovation to help create a more connected and resilient future. Here, your ideas are valued, your growth is supported, and you are encouraged to bring your authentic self to work. We empower our people to collaborate across disciplines, challenge the status quo, and shape a career with purpose.
   

  

 Join us.
   

  

*Please Note:
   

  

 Health and Safety is a core paramount value of WSP. Given the importance of keeping one another safe it is expected that you comply with our Health, Safety & Environment (HSE) policy at all times as well as client HSE policies when working at client locations. Full details here .
   

  

 Some safety-sensitive positions involve fieldwork and may include work in a variety of environmental conditions, such as remote or isolated areas, working alone, and in inclement weather (within safe and reasonable limits).
   

  

 WSP welcomes and encourages applications from people with disabilities. Accommodations are available on request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process.
   

  

 WSP is committed to the principles of employment equity. Only the candidates selected will be contacted.
   

  

 WSP does not accept unsolicited resumes from agencies. Full details here .*

title: Senior Search & Discoverability Lead
description:
Mentimeter is an engagement tool with a clear goal in mind. To turn presentations into conversations. Through real-time interactivity and clear visualizations, we get people to participate, engage and become more productive. Transforming all those passive meetings, airless classrooms and drawn out trainings into valuable and memorable moments.
   

  

 We truly believe that you achieve the best results by doing things together. And that successful leaders need to adopt a curious and collaborative mindset in order to get there. So with you at Mentimeter, you’ll be a big part of the ambition to help over 1 billion people listen, learn and work better together.
   

  

***Summer hiring notice:** 
 Due to summer vacations, we will begin the reviewing and interviewing process for this role from August. However, we encourage you to submit your application as soon as possible.*
**Help build the future of discoverability**
 Search is changing faster than ever.
   

  

 People no longer discover products only through Google. They ask ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity. They watch YouTube, browse Reddit, visit review sites and learn through communities.
   

  

 At Mentimeter, we believe the companies that win will combine world-class SEO fundamentals with AI-native systems, automation and modern workflows to become discoverable wherever customers search, ask, learn and buy.
   

  

 That’s why we’re looking for a
 **Senior Search & Discoverability Lead** 
 .
   

  

 This is not a traditional SEO role.
   

  

 It’s an opportunity to build Mentimeter’s discoverability capability for the AI era.
   

  

**Your mission**
**Make Mentimeter the obvious answer wherever people search, ask and learn.**
 You’ll own discoverability across traditional search, AI search and emerging discovery channels.
   

  

 Success won’t be measured by rankings or traffic.
   

  

 It will be measured by qualified acquisition, activation and business impact.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
**Build world-class SEO foundations**
 Build and continuously improve Mentimeter’s technical SEO, content strategy, search intent, information architecture, international SEO, structured data, Core Web Vitals and user experience.
   

  

**Own search & discoverability**
**Own Mentimeter’s Discoverability Strategy Across**
* Organic Search
* Paid Search
* AI Search & LLM visibility
* Google AI Overviews
* YouTube
* Reddit
* Review sites
* Communities
* Emerging discovery channels


 Treat search as one integrated ecosystem rather than separate channels.
   

  

**Build the Discoverability Operating System**
 This is a builder role.
   

  

* Design and build the AI-native operating system that powers discoverability at Mentimeter.


**Create Scalable Systems That Continuously**
* Research competitors
* Discover customer questions
* Identify opportunities
* Generate content briefs
* Enable content production
* Optimize existing content
* Publish improvements
* Measure performance
* Learn from results
* Recommend the next best actions


 The goal is a living system that continuously improves through AI, automation and human expertise.
   

  

**Build AI-native workflows**
* Design agentic workflows by connecting AI models, APIs, MCPs, analytics platforms, CMS workflows and internal data.


**Measure, experiment and evolve**
* Define success metrics.
* Build dashboards.
* Run experiments.
* Measure business impact.
* Continuously evolve how Mentimeter approaches discoverability.


**Enable the organization**
 Build systems, workflows and guidance that enable Product Marketing, Brand, Customer Marketing, Customer Success, Enterprise Marketing and Product teams to create better, more discoverable content.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 You’re deeply experienced in SEO fundamentals but excited about where search is heading.
   

  

 You understand that AI doesn’t replace SEO. It amplifies it.
   

  

 You’re a builder who enjoys creating systems, not just executing tasks.
   

  

 You think from first principles, move comfortably between strategy and execution, and naturally experiment with new AI tools and workflows.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**What you’ll need**
* 8+ years of SEO experience, preferably in-house.
* Deep expertise in technical SEO, content strategy and search intent.
* Experience growing large, international websites.
* Experience with localization at scale.
* Working knowledge of Google Ads and paid search.
* Experience with AI search and LLM visibility.
* Hands-on experience building AI workflows, automations or agentic systems.
* Super user of modern AI tools such as Claude, ChatGPT and Gemini.
* Strong understanding of APIs and MCPs.
* Strong commercial mindset with experience using experimentation and analytics to drive business outcomes.
* Exceptional writing and communication skills.
* Experience collaborating closely with engineering teams.


**Nice to have**
* Experience from a product-led SaaS company.
* Experience managing SEO or SEM agencies.
* Active contributor to the SEO or AI community through writing, speaking or community engagement.
* Familiarity with Python, JavaScript or SQL.


**Success in this role**
**After Your First Year**
* Organic registrations have grown significantly.
* Organic contributes substantially more ARR.
* AI search has become a meaningful acquisition channel.
* Mentimeter’s visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity has increased significantly.
* Share of Voice has increased across our highest-value topics, entities and use cases.
* Mentimeter consistently appears for the most important searches across both Google and AI search.
* Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals and site performance have improved significantly.
* Content production has become dramatically faster through AI-native workflows.
* Time from idea to published, localized content has been significantly reduced.
* Paid and organic search operate as one integrated discoverability system.
* Discoverability has become a strategic growth capability that drives measurable business impact.


 📍
 **Location:** 
 This is a hybrid role at Mentimeter HQ in
 **Stockholm** 
 . Our guideline is at least
 **3** 
**days** 
**a** 
**week** 
 at the office.
   

  

* Please note that we do not offer relocation sponsorship for the position.


**💡Our Recruitment Process**
* Screening interview
* Hiring Manager Interview
* Business Case + Competence Interview
* Culture interview (incl. conducting a personality & logical ability test)
* References & Offer


**Not sure you tick every box?** 
 Apply anyway—great matches often come in surprising shapes.
   

  

 At Mentimeter where we currently boast over 50+ different nationalities, you'll be part of a culture that values creativity, innovation, and inclusivity. We believe in supporting our team members' growth and offering them the platform to excel. If you're eager to contribute to our mission and make a significant impact, we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

**Compensation**
 At Mentimeter, we believe in fair and transparent compensation that grows with you.
   

  

 The full salary range for this role is SEK 60,000–SEK 86,000 per month. It’s intentionally broad to reflect the different stages of growth within the role: from early development to deep expertise and meaningful impact. Where an individual is placed within the range depends on factors such as relevant experience, demonstrated skills, and alignment with the role’s requirements.
   

  

 We’re committed to supporting your growth. You’ll have ongoing development conversations with your manager, and your salary will evolve as you build skills and contribute to our mission.
   

  

 In addition to your monthly salary, we offer a comprehensive benefits package—learn more about it here: https://www.mentimeter.com/benefits/stockholm.
   

  

**What Mentimeter Can Offer**
 At Mentimeter we can offer a diverse and inclusive work environment supported by smart and driven colleagues. We believe in continuous professional development for all of our colleagues and therefore offer access to a leadership program (including external personal coach) and relevant education to ensure that we continue to be state-of-the-art when it comes to innovating and building Mentimeter. Your place will be in a growing company with lots of career opportunities, working on a beloved product used by more than 300 million people. It’s not all about work though, we also offer a very healthy view on work-life balance.
   

  

 All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package, including pension contributions. Learn more about our benefits by visiting our Benefits & Perks page
   

  

**AI and Hiring at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter, we believe AI helps us work smarter - but it never replaces the human assessment, curiosity, and personal connection that define our culture and our hiring. We use AI as a sparring partner: to bounce ideas, bring new perspectives, support structure, and make our work more efficient. But the meaning, decisions, and interactions always come from people.
   

  

* AI does not screen or decide on candidates.
* There is no automated filtering, ranking, or decision-making in our recruitment process. Every application is reviewed by a person.
* Hiring teams may use AI to support their work - for example, to structure notes, prepare interview questions, or organize their thinking.


 AI strengthens our work, but it does not define it. At Mentimeter, we’re not building an AI-driven hiring process - we’re building a people-first culture, where technology helps us listen, learn, and grow together.
   

  

**Culture at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter we believe in giving everyone a voice - regardless of who you are. So we build a platform that does just that. Our platform is not only our product but also our organization. A platform where people feel safe, where differences are embraced, a place where you can have fun. We strongly encourage applicants who are people of color, LGBTQ+, women, people with disabilities, and/or formerly incarcerated people, and a college degree is not strictly required. In order to give everyone a voice, we need to be as diverse as our users.
   

  

 Learn more about our culture by visiting our Culture page.
   

  

 Review our Privacy Policy for more information.

title: Sales Manager Energy Storage EP Cube - NORDICS (f/m/d)
description:
At Canadian Solar, our vision is to make lives better by bringing electricity powered by the sun to millions of people worldwide. As a leading manufacturer of solar panels, inverters, and energy storage solutions, we've been an industry front-runner since our founding in 2001. Our commitment to sustainability is reflected in all parts of our organization as we navigate the complexities of a booming industry.
   

  

 Throughout Canadian Solar's subsidiaries, e-Storage, Recurrent Energy, MSS and CSI Solar Co., we invest in our employees' growth. Our training programs and promotional opportunities ensure we all can continue to learn. We understand the importance of work-life balance and provide various flexible work options to support our employees' well-being. Join our team to "Make the Difference" by creating a lasting positive impact on the world and the communities where we operate.
   

  

 Maximizing solar self consumption, reducing grid independence, and empowering homeowners with clean energy independence is what EP Cube is all about. We work hard to deliver cutting-edge storage solutions to our customers, and we do it with a strong team who cares.
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced Sales Manager to cover the Nordic region (Sweden, Norway, Denmark, and Finland), with a proven ability to sell, a strong personal network, and a passion for delivering customer excellence. If you have the drive to grow sales and revenue, close high-impact deals, and collaborate cross-functionally in a fast-paced renewable energy sector—this is your opportunity to lead the charge.
   

  

* Sell with dedication - Own the full sales cycle—from prospecting to closing. You are expected to generate, manage, and close opportunities independently.
* Leverage Your Network - Bring and expand your own strong portfolio of installer and distribution network and relationships to accelerate our market reach and sales velocity.
* Champion Customer Excellence - Place the customer at the center of everything. Understand their needs, deliver outstanding service, and build long-term trust and loyalty.
* Drive Revenue Growth - Execute strategic sales & business plans to consistently exceed revenue targets. Prioritize high-impact accounts and deliver results.
* Position with Authority - Confidently communicate the value proposition of our storage solutions, technically and commercially. Differentiate us clearly from competitors.
* Collaborate Internally - Partner closely with internal teams—including marketing, operations, product, and executive leadership to deliver an aligned, best-in-class customer experience.
* Represent Eternal Planet - Act as the face of the company at industry events, trade fairs, and customer engagements. Build brand awareness and new business opportunities.


**COMPETENCIES**
* Proactive, results-driven with a pragmatic mindset and strong sense of urgency.
* Hands-on approach, down-to-earth mentality, and ability to work autonomously under pressure.
* Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to engage effectively across all organizational levels.


**LANGUAGES**
* English required; fluency in at least one Nordic language (Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, or Finnish) required
* Please submit your CV in English


**LOCATION**
* Nordics (Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland)


**YOUR BACKPACK IS FILLED WITH**
* Minimum 5 years’ experience in B2B sales in solar, energy storage, or cleantech
* A robust personal network of installers, and distributor ready to engage
* Strong sales track record, with clear evidence of independently closing high-value deals
* Deep technical knowledge of residential battery storage systems (string inverter experience is a plus)
* Fluency in English and at least one Nordic language (Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, or Finnish); additional Nordic languages a strong plus, with strong presentation and negotiation skills
* Degree in Engineering, Business, or a related field
* Entrepreneurial, hands-on mindset with a passion for customer success
* Energy, empathy and enthusiasm
* Strong team player


**What we offer:**
* The atmosphere: A modern work environment, brimming with positive energy, healthy growth, and diverse teams
* Additional benefits: Attractive salary package, including company benefits like subsidies for childcare and more
* Balance: Hybrid work (working from home/at the office), flexible hours, and 28 days of vacation, as well as days off for special occasions
* Prospects: Individual professional development programs, training, and workshops
* Opportunities to influence the way we work: The freedom to contribute your own ideas and play a key role in shaping the future of our company
* Sustainability: Efforts include our zero waste office program, systematic recycling, bee keeping, planting trees and regular beach clean-ups
* Our rationale: Solar energy as a sustainable energy source, enabling the world to switch to clean, renewable energy


 #CanadianSolar

title: Technical Solutions Engineer Cybersäkerhet
description:
Vill du vara med och utveckla framtidens digitala identitet?
  
InfoGuard Group utvecklar avancerade lösningar inom digital identitet, Identity & Access Management (IAM) och Zero Trust.
  
  

**Koncernen består bland annat av:**  

WizePass – en modern plattform för digital identitet, autentisering och elektronisk identifiering.
  
MobilityGuard – utvecklare av OneGate, en marknadsledande plattform för Zero Trust, Single Sign-On (SSO), Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) och säker åtkomst.
  
  

Vi söker nu en Technical Solutions Engineer som huvudsakligen kommer att arbeta tillsammans med vårt WizePass Engineering Team, men även bidra till utvecklingen och den tekniska plattformen för OneGate.
  
Det här är en nyckelroll för dig som vill kombinera mjukvaruutveckling, Linux, DevOps, molnteknik och teknisk kunddialog i ett innovativt företag med internationella kunder.
  
Om rollen
  
Som Technical Solutions Engineer blir du en del av vår Engineering-organisation och arbetar nära våra systemutvecklare genom hela produktlivscykeln – från utveckling och test till leverans, drift och vidareutveckling.
  
Du kommer att bidra till utvecklingen av våra produkter samtidigt som du ansvarar för att våra tekniska plattformar fungerar effektivt och att kunder och partners får kvalificerad teknisk hjälp när avancerade frågor uppstår.
  
Du kommer att ha en central roll i att omsätta tekniska behov till hållbara lösningar och fungera som länken mellan utveckling, teknik och kund.
  
Arbetsuppgifter
  
Delta i utvecklingen av WizePass och OneGate tillsammans med våra systemutvecklare.
  
Utveckla interna verktyg, integrationer och automatiseringslösningar.
  
Bygga, konfigurera och underhålla utvecklings-, test- och produktionsmiljöer.
  
Arbeta med AWS, OpenStack, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform och Ansible.
  
Delta i design, implementation och test av nya funktioner.
  
Delta i tekniska leveranser, installationer och uppgraderingar hos kunder och partners.
  
Ansvara för våra Linux-, container- och molnplattformar.
  
Hantera inkommande tekniska ärenden och säkerställa en snabb och professionell återkoppling.
  
Felsöka komplexa tekniska problem och driva dem till lösning i nära samarbete med utvecklingsteamet.
  
Bidra till förbättrad dokumentation, kunskapsdatabaser och interna processer.
  
Medverka i utvecklingen av våra DevOps-processer, CI/CD-flöden och automatiserade deploymentlösningar.
  
  

Vi söker dig som har
  
Krav
  
Minst fem års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Linux.
  
  

**Mycket goda kunskaper inom:**  

AWS
  
OpenStack
  
Docker
  
Kubernetes
  
Terraform
  
Ansible
  
Python
  
Bash
  
Erfarenhet av automatisering, containerplattformar och molnbaserad infrastruktur.
  
God programmeringsvana och ett stort intresse för mjukvaruutveckling.
  
Förmåga att analysera och lösa komplexa tekniska problem.
  
Ett strukturerat arbetssätt och god samarbetsförmåga.
  
  

Meriterande
  
Mycket goda kunskaper i engelska, både i tal och skrift.
  
Kunskaper i spanska.
  
Erfarenhet av utveckling i Java eller Rust.
  
Erfarenhet av Git, GitHub eller GitLab samt CI/CD.
  
Erfarenhet av PostgreSQL eller andra databaser.
  
Erfarenhet av PKI, certifikathantering och Linux Security Hardening.
  
Kunskap om OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, SAML, LDAP eller Active Directory.
  
Erfarenhet av tekniska leveranser och implementationer hos företagskunder.
  
Erfarenhet av incidenthantering, IT Service Management eller ITIL Foundation.
  
Erfarenhet av arbete med cybersäkerhet, IAM eller autentiseringslösningar.
  
  

Vem är du?
  
Du är en nyfiken och lösningsorienterad ingenjör som trivs i en miljö där utveckling, teknik och kundvärde möts.
  
Du uppskattar variation och tycker om att växla mellan programmering, automatisering, Linux-administration, felsökning och tekniska leveranser.
  
Du är kommunikativ, tar ansvar för dina uppgifter och drivs av att hitta smarta lösningar på komplexa problem.
  
Du trivs med att arbeta nära både kollegor, kunder och partners och ser samarbete som en självklar del av framgång.
  
Vi erbjuder
  
Hos InfoGuard Group får du möjlighet att arbeta med några av marknadens mest avancerade lösningar inom digital identitet och cybersäkerhet.
  
Du blir en del av ett erfaret Engineering-team där du får arbeta med modern teknik inom Linux, molninfrastruktur, containerplattformar, DevOps och mjukvaruutveckling.
  
Rollen erbjuder ett varierande arbete med stora möjligheter att påverka våra produkter, våra tekniska plattformar och våra arbetssätt.
  
Du kommer att arbeta med internationella kunder och partners i en organisation där innovation, kvalitet och teknisk kompetens står i centrum.
  
Vi använder AI dagligen och ser positivt på kandidater som använder AI på ett genomtänkt sätt. Om du använder AI för din ansökan, skriv gärna kort hur du använde den och vad som är dina egna formuleringar.
  
**Placering:** Partille (Göteborg)
  
**Läs mer oss på:** www.mobilityguard.com och www.wizepass.com
  
Urval sker löpande, så skicka gärna in din ansökan redan idag.

title: Senior Product Owner
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**  

WirelessCar is looking for an experienced Senior Product Owner to lead product development within a high-performing, cross-functional Agile environment.


As the Product Owner, you will be responsible for defining what should be built, why it matters, and in what priority work should be delivered. Working closely with customers, stakeholders, and engineering teams, you will own and prioritize the product backlog while ensuring the team has the clarity, context, and direction needed to deliver maximum customer value.


You will collaborate closely with the Engineering Manager, Delivery Manager, and Scrum Masters, serving as a key coordination point across teams, customers, and the organization. Beyond backlog ownership, you will help remove delivery impediments, drive continuous improvement initiatives, and contribute to evolving ways of working and requirements management.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Own, prioritize, and manage the product backlog based on business value and customer needs.
* Define product vision, goals, scope, and priorities for development teams.
* Collaborate with customers and stakeholders to gather, refine, and communicate requirements.
* Ensure development teams clearly understand business context and product objectives.
* Work closely with Engineering Managers, Delivery Managers, and Scrum Masters to ensure successful delivery.
* Facilitate collaboration across multiple teams in a complex technical environment.
* Remove obstacles and support problem-solving at the team, customer, delivery, and organizational levels.
* Drive improvements in Agile ways of working, product processes, and requirement management.
* Participate in technical and architectural discussions to align product direction with engineering capabilities.
* Communicate progress, priorities, and roadmap updates to stakeholders at all organizational levels.

**Requirements:**

* 5+ years of experience as a **Product Owner** or in a similar product leadership role.
* Proven experience working within high-performing, cross-functional Agile teams.
* Strong understanding of building, operating, and maintaining large-scale software services.
* Experience motivating and enabling engineering teams to deliver high-quality solutions.
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills across both business and technical audiences.
* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities.
* Ability to influence decision-making across multiple organizational levels.
* Solid understanding of Agile software development methodologies, DevOps practices, and software delivery principles.
* Fluent English, both written and spoken.

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Azure DevSecOps Engineer
description:
\*\*\*\*
 **The candidate must be based in Sweden and have prior work experience in Sweden\*\*\*\*** 




  





  





**Assignment Description** 




 We are looking for an experienced DevSecOps Specialist / Azure DevOps Engineer to establish, secure, and continuously improve CI/CD pipelines within Azure DevOps for a complex enterprise environment.
 



 In this role, you will be responsible for implementing DevSecOps principles across software development and operations by integrating automated security controls, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), container technologies, and modern deployment practices into the software delivery lifecycle. You will work closely with developers, operations, and security teams to enable secure, scalable, and efficient software delivery while driving continuous improvements in deployment automation, cloud security, and monitoring.
 



 Working within a SAFe Agile Enablement Team, you will participate in Agile Release Train (ART) activities, coach engineering teams on modern DevSecOps practices, and evaluate emerging technologies to strengthen the organization's cloud platform and software delivery capabilities.
 



  





**What You Will Work On** 



* Design, implement, and maintain secure CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps
* Develop and optimize YAML-based and Classic Azure DevOps pipelines
* Implement DevSecOps principles throughout the software delivery lifecycle
* Integrate automated security controls into CI/CD workflows
* Configure SAST, DAST, dependency scanning, and secrets management
* Integrate security tools and frameworks into development pipelines
* Develop Infrastructure as Code (IaC) solutions using Terraform, Bicep, or ARM Templates
* Support containerized application deployments and platform automation
* Improve deployment automation, monitoring, and release processes
* Drive continuous improvements in DevSecOps, cloud security, and operational excellence
* Coach development teams on secure software delivery and DevSecOps best practices
* Collaborate closely with development, operations, and security teams
* Participate in SAFe Agile ceremonies including PI Planning, System Demo, and Inspect & Adapt
* Manage cross-team dependencies within Agile Release Trains
* Evaluate and recommend new DevSecOps tools, frameworks, and cloud technologies
* Develop technical documentation, standards, and deployment guidelines



  





  





**What You Bring** 



* Several years of experience working with DevOps or DevSecOps in complex enterprise environments
* Deep expertise in Azure DevOps
* Strong experience with YAML-based and Classic Azure DevOps pipelines
* Strong understanding of CI/CD security best practices
* Hands-on experience with SAST, DAST, dependency scanning, and secrets management
* Experience integrating security tools and frameworks into CI/CD pipelines
* Strong Infrastructure as Code (IaC) experience using Terraform, Bicep, or ARM Templates
* Experience working with container-based platforms and deployments
* Strong collaboration skills with development, operations, and security teams
* Excellent communication and coaching abilities
* Experience working within SAFe Agile or similar Agile frameworks
* Fluent Swedish and English, both written and spoken
* Proactive, structured, solution-oriented, and quality-focused mindset

title: Linux Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Linux Engineer to join us at Telia Cygate.
   

  

 My name is Petra Peric, Head of Cloud Operation, and I’m looking for someone who wants to grow together with us. We are a supportive and forward-looking delivery team within Managed Services, responsible for delivering Hybrid & Cloud services across Telia Cygate. We are growing rapidly within this area and see significant opportunities ahead, especially within AI-driven platforms and services.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 A few sentences describing the main focus areas of the role.
   

  

 As a Linux Engineer, you will play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining Telia Cygate’s container-based platforms and services. You will help our customers succeed in their digital transformation journeys while supporting the evolution of modern cloud-native solutions.
   

  

* Design and implement Telia Cygate’s Kubernetes-as-a-Service platform
* Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines to ensure secure and efficient application delivery
* Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize containerized applications and infrastructure
* Collaborate with development teams to integrate container solutions into existing systems and workflows
* Resolve technical challenges related to container technologies and cloud platforms
* Stay up to date with industry trends and best practices within cloud-native technologies
* Mentor and support junior engineers and developers within the container ecosystem
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of our platform services and automation capabilities


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
 You have a genuine interest in technology, innovation, and helping customers achieve their goals. You enjoy working in modern environments where collaboration, problem-solving, and continuous learning are key.
   

  

 We believe you are:
   

  

* Self-driven and proactive, with the ability to take ownership and drive initiatives forward
* Constructive and resilient when facing challenges and setbacks
* A team player who enjoys collaborating and sharing knowledge
* Flexible and adaptable in a fast-changing environment


 We also believe you bring:
   

  

* At least 5 years of experience working with container technologies such as Kubernetes and Docker
* Strong understanding of CI/CD processes and tools such as Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, or similar
* Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform
* Solid scripting and automation skills using Bash, Python, Go, or similar programming languages
* Experience working in agile development environments
* Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills
* Excellent communication skills with fluency in Swedish (native or near-native) and good English, as well as experience leading, mentoring, and educating teams


 It is also a plus if you have:
   

  

* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA), Docker Certified Associate (DCA), or similar certifications
* Experience working with security and compliance in containerized environments
* Knowledge of networking architecture and security within Kubernetes and cloud-native environments


**Why Telia Cygate?**
 At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.
   

  

 Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.
   

  

 Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!
   

  

**Telia Cygate is proud to be certificated as Great Place to Work!**
 With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**Interested? Apply!**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **2026-08-30.** 
 Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

 Location: Solna / Växjö / Malmö / Karlstad
   

  

 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner.**
 Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

 Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to Petra Peric, Head of Cloud Operation, at petra.peric@cygate.se.
   

  

 We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.
   

  

**Welcome to Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Infrastructure Engineer (Windows, Linux, Automation & GCP)
description:
Om tjänsten
   

  

 Som
 **Infrastructure Engineer** 
 blir du en del av ett erfaret team som arbetar med att utveckla, automatisera och förvalta en modern hybrid IT-miljö. Rollen har ett tydligt fokus på både
 **Windows Server, Linux** 
 samt Microsofts infrastrukturtjänster och virtualisering, samtidigt som du är med och driver vår resa mot en mer automatiserad och molnbaserad plattform.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta med att designa, administrera och automatisera storskaliga Windows och Linux -miljöer där
 **Infrastructure as Code (IaC)** 
 är en naturlig del av arbetssättet. Vi ser att du har ett intresse för cloud och automation och vill utveckla moderna lösningar som fungerar sömlöst tillsammans med vår befintliga on-prem-miljö. Vår primära molnplattform är
 **Google Cloud Platform (GCP)** 
 .
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att arbeta med
   

  

* Administrera och utveckla Windows och Linux Server-miljöer i större skala
* Automatisera infrastruktur och konfiguration med Infrastructure as Code
* Hantera och vidareutveckla virtualiseringsplattformar
* Förvalta och utveckla Microsofts infrastrukturtjänster, exempelvis Active Directory, DNS, DHCP och Group Policy
* Arbeta med moderna lagringslösningar och backup
* Integrera och utveckla lösningar mellan on-prem och GCP
* Bidra till en säker, stabil och framtidssäkrad infrastruktur


 Du blir en del av vårt
 **Infrastructure-team** 
 , där vi tillsammans ansvarar för att leverera stabila och säkra infrastrukturtjänster till verksamheten. Vi arbetar nära varandra, delar kunskap och ger stort utrymme att påverka både teknikval och arbetssätt.
   

  

 Vem vi söker
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och har ett stort intresse för modern infrastruktur. Du gillar att automatisera återkommande arbetsuppgifter, förbättra befintliga lösningar och hålla dig uppdaterad kring ny teknik.
   

  

 Du trivs i en miljö där förändring och utveckling är en naturlig del av vardagen och uppskattar att arbeta både självständigt och tillsammans med andra.
   

  

 Vi söker flera Infrastructure Engineers med olika specialistområden, så även om du inte uppfyller samtliga punkter nedan är du varmt välkommen att söka.
   

  

 Vi ser gärna att du har
   

  

* God erfarenhet av Windows Server och Microsofts infrastrukturtjänster (Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy)
* Erfarenhet av Linux-systemadministration, gärna RHEL eller andra Enterprise Linux-distributioner
* Erfarenhet av Hyper-V eller annan virtualiseringsplattform
* Erfarenhet av administration och drift av större Windows-miljöer
* Goda kunskaper inom någon av de större public cloud-plattformarna, gärna Google Cloud Platform (GCP) men även Azure eller AWS är meriterande
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code och automatisering med exempelvis Terraform, Ansible, Puppet eller PowerShell DSC
* Erfarenhet av scripting och automation, exempelvis med PowerShell, Bash eller Python
* Kunskap inom moderna lagrings- och backup-lösningar är meriterande


 Vi erbjuder
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i en modern hybridmiljö där automation, säkerhet och ständig förbättring står i fokus. Du får stort förtroende, möjlighet att påverka tekniska beslut och utvecklas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor som gärna delar med sig av sin kunskap.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen behöver du kunna kommunicera obehindrat på svenska, både i tal och skrift.
   

  

 Avanza är en ledande digital plattform för sparande och investeringar. Vi grundades 1999 med målet att revolutionera bankbranschen.
   

  

 Genom att ständigt utveckla våra tjänster strävar vi efter att göra sparande och investeringar billigare, bättre och enklare – alltid med kundens bästa i fokus. På så sätt bidrar vi till en bättre framtid för miljoner människor.
   

  

 Idag har över två miljoner människor valt oss. Det är ett förtroende vi tar på största allvar. Hos oss ska man känna sig trygg med att ens pengar får de bästa förutsättningarna att växa och att vi alltid sätter kundnyttan först.
   

  

 Mer till dig, mindre till banken - precis som det borde vara.

title: Manager, Solutions Engineering | NorBen | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs, the company behind the open observability cloud, is founded on the principles of open source, open standards, open ecosystems, and open culture. Grafana Cloud, our fully managed observability platform, is flexible and built for scale. With Grafana Cloud's actually useful AI, organizations can see, understand, and act on all their disparate data to move at the speed of their ambitions. Today, more than 35 million users and 7,000+ customers – including Anthropic, Bloomberg, NVIDIA, Microsoft, and Salesforce – trust Grafana Labs to ensure reliability of their applications and systems, resolve incidents quickly, and optimize their telemetry to reduce noise and cost. We are a 100% remote company with 1,600+ team members across 40+ countries, and we’re backed by leading investors including Lightspeed Venture Partners, Sequoia Capital, GIC, Coatue, J.P. Morgan, CapitalG, and Lead Edge Capital. Learn more at grafana.com and follow us on LinkedIn and X.



We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.



You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.

#### **The Opportunity**

#### As a Manager of Solutions Engineering for the NEMEA region at Grafana Labs, you will be responsible for all aspects of building and managing a team of high performing Solution Engineers. You will own the regional build-out with your sales leader counterparts, adopting existing OSS Specific GTM strategies and developing new ones as needed. You’ll work with your Customer Experience counterparts to ensure that your customers are successful after the sale, in their adoption and rollout of Grafana products through professional services, support, training and customer success. You’ll work with marketing to drive community and adoption programs in the region designed to broaden the adoption of both OSS and commercial/cloud versions of our products. You’ll also work closely with Product Management and Engineering to ensure that we are constantly delivering value to our customers by influencing the roadmap, based on your customers and team feedback, as well as leveraging your own experience in the Monitoring and Observability space. All of this will be required for you to hit and then exceed your region's financial targets and ultimately, our company's goals. Your impact will be felt globally when the job is done well.

**What you'll be Doing:**


* Attract, recruit, ramp and mentor a team of great Presales SE’s from diverse backgrounds and experiences.
* Get the best out of your team with a servant based leadership approach. Adopting a player/coach mentality will be critical here, ensuring that you balance your field responsibilities with the needs of your team. Mentoring and career development will be critical to your team's success over the long term
* Direct the bulk of your day to day work based on guidance and goals from leadership, owning the planning, actions and outcomes of the region.
* Partner with the Benelux / NEMEA Sales leadership on customer programs, marketing initiatives and community/company events to drive adoption and expansion within our customer base.
* Executive sponsorship of key accounts in the region will be key to your success. Being a thought leader/partner to your customers and the company within EMEA.
* Understanding your key customers’ strategies for adoption of Grafana technologies and developing programs and collateral to enable them to be successful.
* Ensure that your customers’ requirements are being met with our product through partnership with Product Management and Engineering, helping them prioritize their team's time with a data-driven approach to wins/losses/needs vs wants, etc.
* Own and report on the quarter over quarter cadence of your team while they help prospects evaluate our software with demonstrations, technical deep dives, trials and POVs.
* Find and drive enablement and sell with/through channel partners in the region. Both at a local, geo and global level with both RSI’s and GSI’s.

**What Makes you a Great Fit:**


* Some experience leading a team, 5-10 years in the high tech industry having held roles such as Developer, Architect, Sales Engineer/Architect, Manager, etc.
* Proven success working in a fast-paced, high growth startup environment that is remote-first
* Proven track record of mentoring, developing people and managing performance over time. Has successfully mentored individual contributors.
* Open Source selling or Cloud first/Product led sales go to market motion a big plus.
* Direct experience implementing and/or executing a formal sales methodology, eg COM, Value selling, qualification frameworks like MEDDPICC
* Direct experience selling monitoring/data/visualisation products.
* Proven ability to own a book of business, direct your own and your team's work and initiatives to exceed your quarterly targets.
* English fluency required, and a second European language is preferred
* Located in Sweden


In Sweden, the OTE compensation range for this role is SEK 1,480,000 - SEK 1,775,000. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed in the interview process. Benefits include equity, bonus (if applicable), and other benefits listed on our careers page.



#LI-Remote


* *Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.*


**Why You’ll Thrive at Grafana Labs:**


* **100% Remote, Global Culture -** As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* **Scaling Organization** – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* **Transparent Communication** – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* **Innovation-Driven** – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* **Open Source Roots** – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* **Empowered Teams** – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* **Career Growth Pathways** – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* **Approachable Leadership** – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* **Passionate People** – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* **In-Person onboarding** - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* **Balance is Key** - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. *\*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.*


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** *Grafana Labs is an equal opportunities employer. We welcome applications from everyone regardless of race, colour, nationality, origin, caste, sex, gender reassignment identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, religion or belief, disability, veteran status, genetic information, pregnancy, maternity, marital, family or carer status, or any other characteristic which is protected by local law. We believe that equality and diversity build a strong organisation, and we work hard to ensure that is the foundation of our organisation as we grow.*


*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*



#LI-Remote



*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our* *privacy policy**.*
company_description: Grafana Labs is the company behind Grafana, the leading open source software for visualizing time series data.

title: Senior Sales Engineer
description:
As a Sales Engineer, you'll architect high-performance storage solutions that enable customers to achieve their boldest ambitions. Work across finance, pharmaceuticals, education, and physical AI—designing systems that power real-time trading, accelerate drug discovery, enable groundbreaking research, and fuel autonomous systems.

  

You'll translate complex customer requirements into elegant technical solutions, demonstrate capabilities through POCs and benchmarks, and serve as a trusted advisor throughout the sales cycle.

  

**What You'll Do**
------------------

**Customer Engagement**
-----------------------

* Partner with customers to understand their critical data challenges—high-frequency trading, genomics processing, AI model training, or autonomous vehicle sensor fusion
* Translate technical requirements into elegant, scalable storage solutions that exceed expectations
* Act as trusted technical advisor throughout the sales cycle

**Solution Design**
-------------------

* Architect storage for AI/ML training, HPC simulations, data analytics, and GPU-accelerated workloads
* Design for reliability, resilience, security, and scale—balancing performance with data protection
* Create BOMs, system architectures, and technical proposals for complex RFPs
* Conduct live demos, POCs, and performance benchmarking
* Integrate with GPU clusters, Kubernetes, cloud platforms, and AI frameworks

**Innovation & Growth**
-----------------------

* Stay current on AI infrastructure and storage technology trends
* Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams using field insights
* Mentor team members and contribute to technical thought leadership
* Shape product direction based on customer needs

**What You Bring**
------------------

**Technical Foundation (All Levels)**
-------------------------------------

* Strong understanding of storage and data architectures: SAN, NAS, object storage, parallel file systems
* Knowledge of architectural patterns for reliability, resilience, security, and scale
* Understanding of storage and data protocols: S3, POSIX, NFS, SMB
* Familiarity with network protocols: TCP/IP, InfiniBand, RDMA
* Curiosity about massively parallel technologies (Lustre, GPFS, Exascaler)
* Aptitude for AI workloads and how storage enables AI innovation
* Ability to communicate technical concepts to both engineers and executives

**Entry Level (0-3 years)**
---------------------------

* Bachelor's in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience)
* Exposure to storage/systems through coursework, internships, or projects
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Customer-facing communication skills

**Experienced (3+ years)**
--------------------------

* 3-8+ years in pre-sales, solutions architecture, or technical consulting
* Proven track record designing storage/infrastructure solutions
* Hands-on experience with enterprise storage systems
* Experience with AI/ML infrastructure, HPC, or high-performance workloads (preferred)
* Success managing complex technical sales cycles

**What Sets You Apart**
-----------------------

* Genuine curiosity about AI and its impact across industries
* Ownership mindset—you solve problems until they're solved
* Ability to translate technical complexity into business value
* Thrive in fast-evolving technology environments
* Collaborative team player with integrity and empathy

title: AI Customer Engineer, Nordics, Cloud AI Tech GTM
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience with cloud native architecture in a customer-facing or support role.
* Experience in architecting solutions that integrate AI models using agents with enterprise data sources using patterns like Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Text-to-SQL, and semantic search.
* Experience with search systems including retrieval, ranking, and search quality tuning.
* Experience coding in Python, JavaScript or TypeScript, Go, or Java to demo, prototype, or workshop integration patterns with customers.
* Experience presenting to technical stakeholders and executive leaders.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience with iPaaS, Application Programming Interface (API) gateways, or Enterprise Service Buses (ESBs) in a cloud environment.
* Experience with functional evaluation metrics used to assess model quality and agent quality.
* Experience developing agents using frameworks such as LangGraph, Semantic Kernel, or the Google AI Agent Development Kit (ADK).
* Knowledge of observability constructs including distributed tracing, logging, and audit logging for AI applications.
* Knowledge of application integration governance and security, including OAuth2 flows and short-lived credential management.
* Understanding of integration patterns using OpenAPI and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to connect AI agents with business systems and API gateways.

**About the job**
-----------------


At Google Cloud, we are pivoting from standard cloud adoption to leading the "Agentic Era" of enterprise technology.


As an AI/ML Customer Engineer Specialist, you will engage with the most ambitious enterprises across the Nordic regions to redefine their business strategies through AI. You will act as a trusted AI advisor capable of commanding a room of executive decision-makers, and a highly skilled developer who can open a laptop and build state-of-the-art, machine-learning-powered systems. You will partner closely with strategic sales teams to lead proactive discovery, identify high-impact AI workloads, and design advanced architectures that drive measurable business outcomes.


In this role, you will step away from high-volume, superficial support and adopt a "fewer accounts, deeper technical execution" model, dedicating your technical expertise to a highly focused portfolio of strategic focus accounts. You will serve as the ultimate technical authority on integrating advanced generative AI and multi-agent orchestration systems into complex enterprise environments. You will own the customer's AI success journey end-to-end. By building continuous, long-term relationships with technical decision-makers and CXOs, you will earn a seat at the table as their primary AI strategist.


You will architect robust, data-connected solutions that move beyond simple chat interfaces. Crucially, once you have secured executive commitment and built high-impact prototypes, you will orchestrate seamless handovers within our Forward-Deployed Engineers (FDEs), who will bring your architectures into full-scale production.
Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.


Individual pay is determined by factors including job-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training.
  

  

Sweden: kr1260000 - kr1300000 (SEK) + 42.86% bonus target + equity + benefits  

  

Learn more about benefits at Google.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Initiate strategic conversations with customer CXOs, VPs, and technical decision-makers to identify complex AI workloads. Deliver workshops and rapid-prototyping sessions that influence leaders to change their technology roadmaps in favor of Google Cloud AI.
* Design, document, and execute an AI strategic technical plan for your focus accounts, guiding them through advanced AI maturity stages and successfully moving net-new use cases toward production.
* Build, code, and deploy functional, customer-tailored proofs-of-concept (POCs) and minimum viable products (MVPs). Maintain a Level 400 technical capability in agentic frameworks, enterprise architectures, and developer tools.
* Act as the technical bridge between the customer and Google's engineering resources. Refine initial requirements, prepare technical environments, and execute high-fidelity, documented handovers to Forward-Deployed Engineers (FDEs) for production deployment.
* Serve as "Customer Zero" by adopting newly released AI technology early (EAP, Public Previews). Identify, prioritize, and document customer feature requests, blockages, and platform gaps, maintaining a tight feedback loop with Google AI Product Management and Engineering to help shape the global AI roadmap.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.
