Du trivs i en miljö där förändring och utveckling är en naturlig del av vardagen och uppskattar att arbeta både självständigt och tillsammans med andra.


Vi söker flera Infrastructure Engineers med olika specialistområden, så även om du inte uppfyller samtliga punkter nedan är du varmt välkommen att söka.


**Vi ser gärna att du har**
---------------------------


* God erfarenhet av **Windows Server** och Microsofts infrastrukturtjänster (Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy)
* Erfarenhet av **Linux-systemadministration**, gärna RHEL eller andra Enterprise Linux-distributioner
* Erfarenhet av **Hyper-V** eller annan virtualiseringsplattform
* Erfarenhet av administration och drift av större Windows-miljöer
* Goda kunskaper inom någon av de större public cloud-plattformarna, gärna **Google Cloud Platform (GCP)** men även Azure eller AWS är meriterande
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code och automatisering med exempelvis **Terraform, Ansible, Puppet eller PowerShell DSC**
* Erfarenhet av scripting och automation, exempelvis med **PowerShell, Bash eller Python**
* Kunskap inom moderna lagrings- och backup-lösningar är meriterande

**Vi erbjuder**
---------------


Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i en modern hybridmiljö där automation, säkerhet och ständig förbättring står i fokus. Du får stort förtroende, möjlighet att påverka tekniska beslut och utvecklas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor som gärna delar med sig av sin kunskap.


För att lyckas i rollen behöver du kunna kommunicera obehindrat på svenska, både i tal och skrift.


Avdelning
Tech - Plattform
Roll
Infrastructure Engineer
Platser
Regeringsgatan 103, Stockholm
Distansarbete
Hybridarbete
**Om Avanza**
-------------


Avanza är en ledande digital plattform för sparande och investeringar. Vi grundades 1999 med målet att revolutionera bankbranschen.


Genom att ständigt utveckla våra tjänster strävar vi efter att göra sparande och investeringar billigare, bättre och enklare – alltid med kundens bästa i fokus. På så sätt bidrar vi till en bättre framtid för miljoner människor.


Idag har över två miljoner människor valt oss. Det är ett förtroende vi tar på största allvar. Hos oss ska man känna sig trygg med att ens pengar får de bästa förutsättningarna att växa och att vi alltid sätter kundnyttan först.


Mer till dig, mindre till banken - precis som det borde vara.


Grundades 1999
Medarbetare Cirka 750
company_description: Med visionen om att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor går vi till jobbet för att skapa billigare, bättre och enklare produkter och tjänster för våra kunder!

title: HR Business Solutions Architect
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 175,000 businesses - including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others - rely on Sinch's Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.  



Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.  



At Sinch we "Dream Big", "Win Together", "Keep it simple", and "Make it Happen". These values are our foundation!  



**About the role**

As an HR Business Solution Architect, you are expected to be familiar with HR global best practices, able to translate business needs into process design & business logic and advocate for Oracle HCM best practices to fulfill those needs through.
As a solution architect you are accountable for developing and delivering solutions based on each initiative’s needs. An SA ensures they propose multiple viable solutions to a given need and work with the initiative prioritization combined with the Target Architecture and guidance of EA to ensure the company implements solutions in line with short- and long-term expectations. The Solution Architect creates information, business, and technology architecture to address initiative needs, considering multiple perspectives such as: stakeholder needs, current and target technical landscape, security & and privacy, ownership, quality, time & and cost priorities. SA aims to incorporate the Target Architecture and realize it through their initiatives while navigating the balance between initiative goals and long-term goals.
A solution architect has 80% execution focus, and 20% strategic focus centered on understanding and implementing strategic goals and giving feedback on feasibility & practicality of the strategy.  

**Key Responsibilities*** Establish Solution Architecture for initiatives.
* Understand and execute upon:
 - Enterprise & Domain Architecture
 - Initiative needs & goals
 - Architecture Principles
* Develop and maintain:
 - Guesstimates & estimates for solution proposals
 - High Level Architecture (Business, Information, Technical)
 - Co-ordination with development & execution
 - Architecture principles
 - Design Patterns
* Support & assist with:
 - Screening & Planning of initiatives
 - Development & Execution of initiatives
 - Planning of project activities
 - Managing technical debt

**About you*** 3+ years in Oracle HCM Solution Architecture
* 5+ years working with global HR solutions
* 7+ years in HRIT and/or HR solution architecture space

Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English.  



At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. Unfortunately, we are not supporting relocation at this time.  



**Applicants must:**

* Hold a Swedish or EU/EEA citizenship.
* Have a valid Swedish work permit.

**About our hiring process**

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.


We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/ . No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!  



The monthly salary for this position is between 65k to 80k SEK per month. Factors which may affect pay within this range may include skills, education, experience, and other qualifications.
company_description: We help companies to communicate with customers via messaging, voice and video using multiple channels. Simplifying life by bringing all people and businesses together using technology is our purpose.

title: Fullstack Engineer
description:
TL;DR
  
We're looking for a Fullstack Engineer to ship features end-to-end — from database to UI. You'll build rock-solid systems that connect to CRMs, email providers, calendars, and sales tools, plus the interfaces reps use every day, while keeping latency low and reliability high. Must be obsessed with clean architecture, fast systems, and extreme ownership.
  
Why join
  
We’re a small, talent-dense team of engineers building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value speed, rigour, and extreme ownership. If you're obsessed with product, thrive in ambiguity, and want to push the edge of what agents can do, you’ll feel at home.
  
You'll work on hard problems across the stack - building resilient integrations with enterprise systems, optimizing database queries, reducing API latency, and shipping the interfaces sales reps live in every day. Not another CRUD app.
  
We're backed by founders and operators behind Lovable, OpenAI, Tandem Health, and Neo4j. Our customers across 10 countries report 90% less prospecting time, 3x market coverage, and 2x customer meetings.
  
What you'll do (responsibilities)
  
**In one sentence:** Ship features end-to-end — from the infrastructure that makes AI agents reliable, fast, and scalable to the interfaces reps use daily.
  
**Own features across the stack:** Build complete slices — database schema, API, and React UI — and ship them to customers
  
**Own integrations end-to-end:** Design and build integrations with CRMs, email, calendars, and sales tools
  
**Reduce latency relentlessly:** Optimize database queries, implement caching strategies, and eliminate bottlenecks
  
**Scale the system:** Design for horizontal scaling, handle increased load, and maintain < 200ms response times
  
**Ship fast:** Test ideas, run experiments, iterate daily on real customer feedback
  
**Shape the architecture:** Make foundational decisions on database structure, API design, and system patterns
  
  

Who you are
  
Cracked engineer obsessed with building great software
  
Comfortable with ambiguity, early-stage chaos, and fast iteration
  
Thrive on new tech - LLMs, knowledge graphs, agents, you name it
  
Experience with API integrations, webhooks, OAuth flows, and third-party systems
  
**Comfortable across the stack:** TypeScript on both sides, React on the front
  
Care deeply about performance, observability, and operational excellence
  
Care more about solving problems than polishing abstractions
  
**Fully committed to the mission:** not "just a job"
  
  

What we offer
  
A team of obsessed engineers, full of speed, rigour, and grit
  
**Mission-driven, no-BS culture:** experiment, ship, learn
  
Meaningful equity through qualified employee stock options (QESO) from day one
  
Fully on-site in Stockholm - we believe in working together
  
Top-tier compensation package
  
  

Our stack
  
**Frontend:** React
  
**Backend:** Typescript, Neo4j, PostgreSQL, Node.js, Express
  
**Infrastructure:** Docker, Google Cloud
  
**Agent:** Typescript, LLMs (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini), Mastra
  
  

About Spiich Labs
  
Spiich is the agentic platform for sales teams. Reps focus on the human work — building relationships, building trust, and closing deals — while Spiich agents handle everything else: prospecting, lead generation, CRM updates, meeting prep, follow-ups, and everything in between. The system integrates knowledge graphs, memory, and agentic workflows to deliver real help - not just summarisation or search. We're backed by founders and operators behind Lovable, OpenAI, Tandem Health, and Neo4j.
  
How we hire
  
Submit your application
  
Intro call with the team
  
Technical interview
  
Take-home exercise
  
Join us for trial work lasting 2 days on-site. We'll see how you tick and you get to meet the team and explore whether joining Spiich feels right for you.
  
  

We move fast — the full process typically takes under two weeks.
  
How to Apply
  
Drop us a line at filip@spiich.ai with your GitHub/LinkedIn, a note on why this excites you, and your proudest achievement. No CV needed.

title: Legal Counsel Digital, AI and Cyber Law, Robotics
description:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.


This role sits within ABB's Robotics business, a leading global robotics company. We're entering an exciting new chapter as we’ve announced the plan for SoftBank Group to acquire ABB Robotics. SoftBank is a globally recognized technology group and investor/operator focused on AI, robotics, and next-generation computing. By joining us now, you’ll be part of a pioneering team shaping the future of robotics—working alongside world-class experts in a fast-moving, innovation-driven environment.


This Position reports to:


Global Head of IP and Digital, Robotics  

As **Lead Counsel Digital, AI, & Cyber Law**, you will play a pivotal role in supporting the company’s digital business and transformation initiatives reporting directly to the Head of IP. You will partner with business leaders, technology teams, and group functions to provide practical legal and compliance guidance, ensuring that innovation and growth in digital solutions are underpinned by sound legal frameworks and integrity standards.  

  

The work model for the role is: hybrid #LI-hybrid  

The location for the role is flexible in Europe and US.

 **Your responsibilities:**

* Provide legal advice and support on digital business initiatives, including AI, cloud services, datacentre, software, licensing, and technology-driven solutions.
* Responsible for guiding the company’s digital strategy, leveraging AI and emerging technologies.
* Draft, review, and negotiate a wide range of digital and technology-related agreements with global customers, partners, and suppliers.
* Support digital transformation projects, ensuring compliance with applicable laws, regulations, and internal policies.
* Advise on intellectual property, cybersecurity, and related regulatory issues impacting digital business.
* Collaborate with global and local Legal & Integrity colleagues to ensure consistency of approach across jurisdictions.
* Monitor legal and regulatory trends in digital and technology markets, proactively identifying risks and opportunities.
* Protect the company’s reputation by ensuring operations meet ethical and compliance standards.
* Provide training and guidance to business stakeholders on legal issues relevant to digital offerings.
 **Your qualifications:**

* Qualified lawyer with 10–15 years of experience in commercial/technology law, preferably gained in a multinational corporate or top-tier law firm environment.
* Strong expertise in digital, AI, IT, cyber law, software licensing, cloud, data centre, and data protection law.
* Previous experience in Robotics sector is preferred but not required.
* Proven track record in negotiating complex technology agreements across international markets.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills, able to engage effectively with senior business stakeholders.
* Pragmatic, solution-oriented, and commercially minded, with the ability to balance innovation and risk.
* Fluency in English required; additional European languages are a strong asset.

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

title: Linux Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Linux Engineer to join us at Telia Cygate.


My name is Petra Peric, Head of Cloud Operation, and I’m looking for someone who wants to grow together with us. We are a supportive and forward-looking delivery team within Managed Services, responsible for delivering Hybrid & Cloud services across Telia Cygate. We are growing rapidly within this area and see significant opportunities ahead, especially within AI-driven platforms and services.


**What you’ll do:**

A few sentences describing the main focus areas of the role.


As a Linux Engineer, you will play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining Telia Cygate’s container-based platforms and services. You will help our customers succeed in their digital transformation journeys while supporting the evolution of modern cloud-native solutions.


* Design and implement Telia Cygate’s Kubernetes-as-a-Service platform
* Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines to ensure secure and efficient application delivery
* Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize containerized applications and infrastructure
* Collaborate with development teams to integrate container solutions into existing systems and workflows
* Resolve technical challenges related to container technologies and cloud platforms
* Stay up to date with industry trends and best practices within cloud-native technologies
* Mentor and support junior engineers and developers within the container ecosystem
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of our platform services and automation capabilities

**What will help you thrive in this role:**

You have a genuine interest in technology, innovation, and helping customers achieve their goals. You enjoy working in modern environments where collaboration, problem-solving, and continuous learning are key.


We believe you are:


* Self-driven and proactive, with the ability to take ownership and drive initiatives forward
* Constructive and resilient when facing challenges and setbacks
* A team player who enjoys collaborating and sharing knowledge
* Flexible and adaptable in a fast-changing environment

We also believe you bring:


* At least 5 years of experience working with container technologies such as Kubernetes and Docker
* Strong understanding of CI/CD processes and tools such as Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, or similar
* Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform
* Solid scripting and automation skills using Bash, Python, Go, or similar programming languages
* Experience working in agile development environments
* Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills
* Excellent communication skills with fluency in Swedish (native or near-native) and good English, as well as experience leading, mentoring, and educating teams

It is also a plus if you have:


* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA), Docker Certified Associate (DCA), or similar certifications
* Experience working with security and compliance in containerized environments
* Knowledge of networking architecture and security within Kubernetes and cloud-native environments

**Why Telia Cygate?**

At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.


Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.


Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!


**Telia Cygate is proud to be certificated as Great Place to Work!**

With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.


**What we offer**

When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.


**Interested? Apply!**

We look forward to receiving your application by **2026-08-30.** Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!


Location: Solna / Växjö / Malmö / Karlstad


If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our **Talent Acquisition Partner.**

Background and reference checks will be part of the process.


Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to Petra Peric, Head of Cloud Operation, at petra.peric@cygate.se.


We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.


**Equal opportunities**

At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.


**Welcome to Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Linuxtekniker – Azure & AWS
description:
Om rollen

  

I rollen som Linuxtekniker blir du en del av ett tekniskt kompetent team som ansvarar för att förvalta, vidareutveckla och säkerställa en modern Linuxbaserad klientmiljö. Du arbetar i en hybrid IT-miljö där klientplattformar, molntjänster och infrastruktur samverkar, med fokus på stabilitet, säkerhet och automation.

  

Rollen passar dig som trivs med att arbeta brett inom Linux och vill kombinera tekniskt djup med utveckling och förbättring av plattformar och arbetssätt. Du kommer att samarbeta nära specialister inom klienthantering, cloud, infrastruktur och säkerhet för att skapa effektiva och långsiktiga lösningar.

  

Exempel på arbetsuppgifter

  

* Förvalta och vidareutveckla Linuxbaserade klientlösningar.
* Arbeta med konfiguration, felsökning och livscykelhantering av Linuxklienter.
* Bidra till automation, standardisering och effektivisering av Linuxmiljön.
* Arbeta med Linuxrelaterade lösningar och integrationer i Azure och AWS.
* Säkerställa att lösningar följer interna säkerhetskrav och tekniska riktlinjer.
* Dokumentera tekniska lösningar, rutiner och beroenden.
* Samarbeta med team inom klientplattform, cloud, infrastruktur och IT-säkerhet.
* Bidra till en stabil, säker och modern klient- och plattformsmiljö.
* Säkerhet och teknik

  

Du kommer att arbeta i en verksamhet där höga krav ställs på säkerhet, kvalitet och tillgänglighet. Automation, standardisering och ett proaktivt arbetssätt är en naturlig del av vardagen, och du får möjlighet att arbeta med moderna tekniska lösningar inom både Linux och molnplattformar.

  

Rollen erbjuder en varierad teknisk vardag där du får kombinera operativt arbete med utveckling och förbättring av Linuxmiljön i nära samarbete med flera specialistområden.

  

Vi söker dig som har

  

* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av Linux, exempelvis Ubuntu, Red Hat, Debian eller motsvarande distributioner.
* Erfarenhet av Linuxbaserade klientmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet av konfiguration, felsökning och livscykelhantering inom Linux.
* Goda kunskaper inom scripting eller automation, exempelvis Bash eller Python.
* Erfarenhet av eller kunskap om Azure och AWS.
* Grundläggande förståelse för IT-säkerhet i Linux- och molnmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet av teknisk dokumentation.
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga på svenska och engelska.

  

Meriterande

  

* Praktisk erfarenhet av drift, integration eller automation av Linuxlösningar i Azure och AWS.
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code, exempelvis Terraform.
* Erfarenhet av konfigurationshantering med exempelvis Ansible.
* Erfarenhet av Docker och Kubernetes.
* Erfarenhet av endpoint management för Linux.
* Kunskap inom identitet, behörighet och säkerhetsstyrning i Azure eller AWS.
* Certifieringar inom Linux, Azure eller AWS.
* Erfarenhet från större enterprise-miljöer.

  

Om dig

  

Vi tror att du är en tekniskt nyfiken person som drivs av att utveckla, förbättra och automatisera Linuxmiljöer. Du arbetar strukturerat, har ett analytiskt arbetssätt och trivs med att felsöka komplexa tekniska problem.

  

Du är självgående och ansvarstagande, men uppskattar också att samarbeta med andra tekniska specialister. Med ett stort intresse för modern infrastruktur, molntjänster och säkerhet bidrar du gärna med nya idéer som utvecklar både tekniken och arbetssätten.

  

Övrigt

  

Detta är ett konsultuppdrag på heltid med start september 2026. Placering sker i Linköping, Göteborg eller Solna i en hybrid arbetsmodell. Uppdraget löper till och med 2027.

  

Ansökan

  

Vårt Talent Acquisition-team ser gärna att du som söker har goda referenser och ett strukturerat CV där relevant erfarenhet tydligt framgår. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande, så skicka gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta lovisa@linden-it.se.

title: Senior Large Applications Deal Executive
description:
**Job Description:**

DXC Technology is the world’s leading independent, end-to-end IT services company, helping clients harness the power of innovation to thrive on change. Created by the merger of CSC and the Enterprise Services business of Hewlett Packard Enterprise, DXC Technology serves nearly 6,000 private and public sector clients across 70 countries. The company’s technology independence, global talent and extensive partner alliance combine to deliver powerful next-generation IT services and solutions. DXC Technology is recognized among the best corporate citizens globally. For more information, visit www.dxc.technology


Join DXC’s Large Deals team and play a key role in shaping and winning strategic Applications Transformation opportunities with some of Sweden's leading enterprises.


As a Senior Enterprise Sales Executive, you will develop executive-level relationships, identify high-value transformation opportunities, lead complex pursuits, and close multi-million-euro deals across Application Modernization, Cloud, AI, and Digital Transformation initiatives.


This is a highly visible role focused on winning and delivering large-scale business outcomes for clients.


**What to expect?**

* Develop and manage C-level relationships across target accounts.
* Identify, qualify, and create large transformation opportunities.
* Lead end-to-end sales pursuits from opportunity creation through contract signature.
* Build compelling win strategies and competitive positioning.
* Mobilize and coordinate cross-functional teams including Solution Architects, Bid Managers, Commercial and Delivery Leaders.
* Shape innovative solutions that address client business challenges.
* Lead commercial negotiations while ensuring profitable growth.
* Drive executive engagement throughout the sales lifecycle.
* Ensure a seamless transition from sales to delivery.

**What do we expect?**

* 15+ years of enterprise IT sales experience.
* 10+ years of experience selling complex Application Services and Applications Outsourcing engagements.
* Proven success leading and closing large-scale pursuits valued between €20M and €500M+.
* Fluent Swedish and English languages
* Strong executive presence with experience engaging CIOs, CTOs, CFOs, Chief Digital Officers, and senior business stakeholders.
* Demonstrated success managing complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles and competitive pursuits.
* Experience selling large-scale Application Modernization, Cloud Transformation, Managed Services, Digital Engineering, or AI-led Transformation programs.
* Proven ability to build executive relationships and influence strategic business decisions.
* Strong commercial acumen with experience leading contract negotiations and deal governance.

**Knowledge & Expertise**

* Application Development & Modernization
* Legacy Transformation
* ERP & CRM Platforms

title: Channel Account Manager
description:
**Location**  

Our **Channel Account Manager** will be an integral part of our Sales team in EMEA. This role is based remotely in the UK, Ireland, Estonia, the Netherlands and Sweden.


**Who We Are**  

DoiT is a global technology company that works with cloud-driven organizations to leverage the cloud to drive business growth and innovation. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well-architected and scalable state - from planning to production.



Delivering DoiT Cloud Intelligence, the only solution that integrates advanced technology with human intelligence, we help our customers solve complex multi-cloud problems and drive efficiency.



With decades of multi-cloud experience, we have specializations in Kubernetes, GenAI, CloudOps, and more. An award-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we work alongside more than 4,000 customers worldwide.


**The Opportunity**  

The core mission of the Channel Account Manager is to cultivate and expand relationships with our key channel partners which include Distributors, Managed Services Providers, and Resellers. This role combines strategic relationship management and enablement responsibilities with outbound energy and partner development hustle. You will serve as the primary point of contact for channel partners while simultaneously helping them identify and drive new opportunities for DoiT's PartnerOps solutions, DoiT Cloud Intelligence, PerfectScale, Select, and Attribute — building the pipeline and partnerships that fuel DoiT's indirect channel growth.


#### **Responsibilities**


**Channel Partner Relationship Management**


* Serve as the dedicated relationship owner for channel partners, acting as their primary point of contact across commercial, technical, and operational matters.
* Build and maintain deep, trusted relationships with key stakeholders at channel partners — including partner principals, channel managers, sales teams, and technical leads.
* Conduct regular business reviews with channel partners to assess performance, align on pipeline, and identify growth opportunities.
* Represent DoiT at partner events, industry conferences, and partner-hosted summits to strengthen brand presence and deepen relationships.


**Pitch, Discovery & Pipeline Development**


* Lead compelling, confident introductory pitches of DoiT's solutions to channel partner sales teams and their customers without requiring technical support in room.
* Work with the channel partners on executing customer deal registration for DoiT's solutions.
* Work alongside the Channel Account Executive to track all customer deal registrations from the channel partner to move these opportunities from qualification through close.


**Channel Strategy & Joint GTM**


* Develop and execute joint business plans with channel partners, setting clear revenue targets, milestones, and co-sell activities.
* Influence channel partner roadmaps and go-to-market strategies to increase DoiT's share of wallet within their customer base.
* Collaborate with DoiT's Marketing team on channel-specific campaigns, events and initiatives.
* Monitor and report on channel market trends, competitive dynamics, and partner ecosystem developments to inform DoiT's channel strategy.


**Partner Enablement**


* Work alongside DoiT's Partner Success Team to design and deliver enablement programs equipping channel partner sales and technical teams to effectively position and sell DoiT solutions.
* Support channel partners with the tools, materials, and knowledge they need to confidently position DoiT products in end-customer conversations.
* Partner with Product and Marketing to develop channel-ready collateral, playbooks, and co-branded materials tailored to channel audiences.


**Cross-Functional Collaboration**


* Act as an advocate internally for channel partners — communicating partner needs, deal context, and escalation requests across the organization.
* Provide structured feedback to leadership, Product, and GTM Strategy teams on partner performance, competitive intelligence, and market signals from the field.
* Ensure clean deal registration, CRM accuracy, and pipeline hygiene across all partner-sourced opportunities.

#### **Qualifications**


* 7+ years of experience in channel sales, partner management, or indirect channel roles.
* Proven ability to operate across both strategic partner management and outbound partner development within the same role or program.
* Deep understanding of Reseller and MSP business models, channel economics, and the technology distribution landscape.
* Strong knowledge of cloud channel programs and partner ecosystems across AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.
* Proven ability to lead an initial product pitch and structured discovery conversation independently, without requiring technical support.
* Experience working within FinOps, CloudOps, or cloud cost management domains is a significant advantage; curiosity and willingness to develop deep product knowledge is essential.
* Excellent prospecting, relationship-building, communication, and executive presentation skills — equally comfortable opening cold conversations and running senior partner QBRs.
* Highly organized with strong CRM discipline and the ability to manage a high volume of partner relationships and active pipeline simultaneously.
* Self-motivated, entrepreneurial, and energized by building in a fast-moving, remote-first environment.


**Are you a Do'er?**  

Be your truest self. Work on your terms. Make a difference.



We are home to a global team of incredible talent who work remotely and have the flexibility to have a schedule that balances your work and home life. We embrace and support leveling up your skills professionally and personally.


What does being a Do'er mean? We're all about being entrepreneurial, pursuing knowledge and having fun! Click here to learn more about our core values.



Sounds too good to be true? Check out our Glassdoor Page.



We thought so too, but we're here and happy we hit that 'apply' button.


* Unlimited Vacation
* Flexible Working Options
* Health Insurance
* Parental Leave
* Employee Stock Option Plan
* Home Office Allowance
* Professional Development Stipend
* Peer Recognition Program


**Many Do'ers, One Team**  

DoiT unites as *Many Do'ers, One Team*, where diversity is more than a goal—it's our strength. We actively cultivate an inclusive, equitable workplace, recognizing that each unique perspective enhances our innovation. By celebrating differences, we create an environment where every individual feels valued, contributing to our collective success.

title: AI Engineer
description:
### **AI Engineer**


At Rift Gaming, our mission is to make the world more fun by helping game studios build the best possible games. Rift was built exclusively for game development, ensuring studios never have to compromise on quality when bringing in external expertise.


As AI rapidly transforms software development, we're looking for experienced AI Engineers who want to help us adopt new technologies in practical, meaningful ways. Depending on the project, you could be building AI-powered applications, integrating LLMs into workflows, developing intelligent backend services, or helping us explore entirely new ways of using AI.

##### **What we're looking for**

* 5+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* Strong programming skills in Python, C++, C#, Go, or similar.
* Experience building AI-powered applications or integrating modern AI services.
* Experience working with LLMs and AI APIs such as Anthropic, OpenAI or Gemini.
* Experience with backend development and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
* Strong problem-solving skills and an interest in applying AI to real-world challenges.
* Excellent communication skills in English.

##### **Nice to have**

* Experience from the games industry.
* Experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, or other ML frameworks.
* Familiarity with vector databases, RAG, AI agents, or MLOps.
* Experience with Unreal Engine or Unity.
* Have shipped AI-powered products or features.

##### **What we offer**

* A supportive environment with passionate professionals.
* A hybrid work setting.
* Work with top-tier game studios.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.
* Profit sharing.

##### **Our values**


Our company is fuelled by three core values: **Progression, Passion, and Trust.** We pursue continuous improvement and growth, pushing boundaries for ourselves and our clients. Our passion for games and technology drives our curiosity and dedication, while trust is the foundation of every relationship we build: with both our clients and our colleagues.

title: Enterprise Architect
description:
*At the Vitrolife Group, we work every day to unlock the full potential of science and technology to reduce the barriers towards building a family. Together we help our customers and their patients to fulfill the dream of having a baby.*

**Shape the Decisions Behind Our Product Model — Not Just the Diagrams**


Are you energized by architecting for empowered product teams rather than for a control room? We're looking for an Enterprise Architect to guide Vitrolife Group through our shift from project-driven delivery to a domain-based product operating model — in a MedTech setting where regulation, AI governance, and platform engineering all have to work together from day one.

 **Your Mission**  

  

You'll architect for team autonomy and clear domain boundaries, govern through decision records instead of review-board theatre, and treat regulatory constraints (SaMD, IEC 62304, MDR/IVDR) as inputs to design rather than a documentation exercise at the end. You'll also help define how AI is governed across the enterprise, and how AI is used responsibly within the architecture practice itself.

**What You'll Do**

* Architect for empowered, autonomous product teams aligned to business domains, not a central control point
* Own canonical domain and data models across the organization, including alignment to standards like FHIR R5 where relevant
* Write and review architecture decision records (ADR/LDDR) as the primary governance mechanism
* Define enforceable, auditable guardrails for agentic AI systems, aligned to the EU AI Act
* Bring SaMD classification, ISO 14971, IEC 62304, and MDR/IVDR cybersecurity requirements into architecture decisions from the start
* Champion Team Topologies, platform engineering, and governance-as-code across delivery pipelines
**What You Bring**

* Proven experience as an enterprise, solution, or lead architect in a product-operating-model or platform-engineering context
* Strong grounding in domain-driven design, capability mapping, and canonical data modeling
* Comfort with Azure landing zone architecture, Terraform, and modern CI/CD (OIDC, GitHub Enterprise Cloud)
* A track record of governing through decision records and paved paths rather than central approval gates
* The instinct to separate governing AI from using AI — and to keep accountability for outcomes either way
* An enabler mindset: you see internal teams as customers of the platform, not requesters in a queue
**Bonus Points For (Highly Desired for This Role)**

* Experience in MedTech, life sciences, or another regulated industry (MDR/IVDR, ISO 13485, IEC 62366, IEC 81001-5-1)
* Familiarity with FHIR and healthcare data interoperability standards
* Experience embedding SBOM, SLSA, or STRIDE-based threat modeling into delivery pipelines
* Exposure to .NET / C# backend architecture and vertical slice design
* Experience with fine-grained authorization models (e.g. OpenFGA) alongside Entra ID
 *Vitrolife Group is a global provider of medical devices and genetic services. Based on science and advanced research capabilities, we develop services and products for personalized genetic information and medical device products. We support our customers by improving their clinical practice for the patient's outcome of fertility treatment.*

*We are currently approximately 1 100 colleagues worldwide, with headquarters in Gothenburg, Sweden. Vitrolife Group's products and services are available in more than 110 countries through our own presence in 30 countries and a network of distributors. Vitrolife Group is a sustainable market leader and aims to be the preferred partner for IVF-clinics by providing superior products and services with the vision of fulfilling the dream of having a baby. The Vitrolife share is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm.*
company_description: The Vitrolife Group is a world-leading global provider of medical devices and genetic testing services.

title: Data Center Technician , DCC Communities
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.  

  

You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.  

  

We are looking for Data Center Technicians to join our expanding Infrastructure Operations team. Data Center Technicians are the primary resolver and troubleshoot and solve a range of datacenter infrastructure issues including, but not limited to: hardware, fiber, networking, and related problems. You will be part of the Data Center Operations (DCO) team, overseeing the operation and maintenance of the IT infrastructure and hardware for data centers in AWS Cloud regions. You will become the primary resolver for your support team, and gain troubleshooting skills on different hardware and software cases. You will be able to troubleshoot and solve most infrastructure issues and engage other appropriate solutions groups on more complex problems to drive solutions..  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* SAFETY

  

Follow and maintain the highest safety standards and diligently encourage a world-class safety culture. Own the safety initiatives and projects to foster a strong safety culture.  

  

* DATA CENTER OPERATIONS (DCO)

  

This position involves:  

* Diagnosing hardware and network problems followed by physical repairs
* Troubleshooting events within internal Service Level Agreements (SLAs)
* Performing root cause analysis of equipment failures
* Manual handling and lifting of equipment may be required (weight limits in accordance with regulations)
* Working rotating shifts (morning/night) as well as weekends to maintain the 24/7 data center environment

  

A valid (EU) driving license is required as Data Centers may not have any public transportation available nearby.  

  

Location Requirements:  

Our data centers are located in remote areas where access via public transport may be limited. Therefore, a valid EU driving license is required for this role.  

  

Work Schedule:  

This is a 100% onsite in-person position due to the hands-on nature of managing mission-critical infrastructure and data center industry.  

  

A day in the life  

In this role, you'll be working on our advanced ticketing system, managing a diverse workload and solving complex server hardware issues.
  

  

You'll be part of a collaborative team that keeps our cloud infrastructure running smoothly, responding to both automated directives and team leadership with exceptional time management and adaptability.  

  

Your expertise in problem ticket tracking and escalation procedures will be crucial as you consistently meet and exceed Amazon's high standards for technical proficiency and operational excellence. This role is vital in maintaining the efficiency and reliability of our sophisticated data center infrastructure – you'll be working and supporting the face of Cloud technology in the region.  

  

We're looking for skilled technicians with a passion for technology to help us expand our Cloud to the next level.
  

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.  

  

Mentorship & Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------


- - 1+ years of technical experience - General knowledge of troubleshooting server hardware issues - Basic networking experience - Ability to work well with others in a team environment, displaying excellent time management skills - Ability to take direction from both a directed work system and/or a team lead - Able to lift/move up to 18kg equipment - Basic networking knowledge - Valid EU driving license

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------


- - Experience with problem ticket tracking, prioritization, and escalation procedures - Understanding of maintenance windows/change management procedures - Basic understanding of data center facilities - Networking administration and/or certification - CCENT/CCNA, Network+, A+ - Scripting skills - Bash, Python, Perl, Ruby, etc.  

* Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. title: Core Ledger Specialist
description:
We're looking for a skilled **Core Ledger Specialist** to join our platform team. Our team does not develop the core ledger systems ourselves — they are built and delivered by external suppliers. Your role is to understand the business and financial logic deeply, define and write clear requirements, verify and regression test what our suppliers deliver, and support internal configuration of the platform. A significant part of this role is providing hands-on internal support to colleagues across the business who rely on the core ledger day to day — this is something all specialists in the team spend a lot of time on. This role calls for strong analytical and technical skills combined with a good understanding of how financial ledgers work.


You will join a small, close-knit team: today the Core Ledger team consists of a Head of Core Ledger IT, a Product Manager, and two Core Ledger Specialists (one of whom also carries delivery management responsibilities). This is a great opportunity to make a direct impact early on and help shape the team as it grows.

##### **Key Responsibilities**

* Define and document clear, detailed requirements for transaction processing, balance management, and posting logic, to be delivered by external suppliers
* Verify and regression test supplier deliveries to ensure data integrity, accuracy, and consistency across all ledger operations
* Collaborate with the Head of Core Ledger IT and suppliers on solution design and technical decisions
* Investigate and resolve complex ledger-related incidents and data discrepancies, working with suppliers when needed
* Maintain clear documentation, including requirements, data flows, test results, and runbooks
* Support internal configuration of the core ledger platform
* Provide hands-on internal support to other teams (finance, customer service, operations, and others) on day-to-day ledger questions and issues — this is a significant and ongoing part of the role
* Support integration of new products and financial instruments into the ledger framework, working with suppliers and Product Management
* Work closely with QA and the Delivery Manager to ensure supplier deliveries are well tested before approval

##### **Qualifications and Experience**

*Desired Skills*

* 4+ years of experience working with financial or transactional systems, in a requirements, analysis, or configuration role
* Strong understanding of bookkeeping, financial transaction processing, or core banking systems
* Experience writing clear, detailed requirements and acceptance chriteria for systems delivered by external suppliers
* Familiarity with relational databases and ability to query and analyse data (SQL)
* Solid understanding of how to verify and test complex system deliveries

*Nice to Have*

* Experience working in a regulated financial environment (banking, payments, BNPL)
* Knowledge of accounting standards and financial reporting requirements
* Experience working with externally delivered or outsourced systems
* Familiarity with testing frameworks and structured test methodologies

*Behaviours*

* Precision-minded — takes accuracy and correctness seriously, especially in financial contexts
* Service-minded and approachable — enjoys helping colleagues understand and resolve ledger-related questions
* Curious and continuous learner who stays current with industry practices
* Collaborative team member who shares knowledge and supports colleagues
* Takes ownership of problems and follows through to resolution
* Constructive and clear in requirements discussions and supplier reviews

**Education**  

BSc or MSc in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.

**Languages**  

Fluent English is required for this role. Fluent Swedish is not a hard requirement, but is desirable as Swedish is the language spoken locally in the team and will make day-to-day collaboration easier.

##### **We Offer**

* A key role in building and shaping a modern, cloud-native core ledger platform
* A collaborative, cross-functional team environment with short decision paths
* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Flexible working arrangements with hybrid options
* Opportunities for professional development and continuous learning
* A chance to make a real impact in the fintech space across the Nordic market
* Modern office in central Borås with a strong team culture

title: QA Lead – Core Ledgers
description:
We are looking for an experienced QA Lead to own quality assurance for our Core Ledger platform. Our team does not develop the core ledger systems ourselves — they are built and delivered by external suppliers. Your role is to set the test strategy, verify and regression test what our suppliers deliver, and make sure nothing goes live unless it meets our requirements. Since the systems involved are financial, precision and thoroughness really matter — you will be the last line of defence before a delivery is approved.


This is a newly established, hands-on position within a small team. In this initial phase, the role will not carry direct reports; instead, the focus will be on personally executing tests, developing the test strategy, and leading verification and regression testing efforts in close collaboration with the wider team.

 **Key Responsibilities**

* Define and own the overall test strategy for the Core Ledger domain, covering functional, regression, integration, and acceptance testing of supplier deliveries
* Personally build and maintain test plans, test cases, and (where applicable) automated regression suites
* Work with the Head of Core Ledger IT, Core Ledger Specialists, and Product Manager to embed quality from requirements through to delivery approval
* Verify and regression test ledger transaction flows, balance calculations, and reconciliation logic delivered by suppliers
* Drive a quality mindset across requirements writing, ensuring testability is considered from the start
* Investigate and triage defects, coordinating resolution with suppliers and internal stakeholders
* Define and track quality metrics; report on test coverage, defect trends, and delivery readiness
* Participate in go/no-go decisions for supplier deliveries based on quality criteria
* Support internal teams with questions about test results, known issues, and quality status
* Contribute to risk assessments for major platform changes or new product introductions

##### **Qualifications and Experience**

*Desired Skills*

* 5+ years in QA roles, with experience leading test strategy and acceptance testing for complex systems
* Strong experience with test automation tools and frameworks (e.g. Selenium, Cypress, RestAssured, Playwright or similar tooling)
* Deep knowledge of testing methodologies — functional, regression, integration, and acceptance testing
* Experience verifying and accepting deliveries from external suppliers or vendors
* Solid understanding of how to structure test plans and test cases against detailed requirements

*Nice to Have*

* Experience testing financial systems — ledgers, payment flows, reconciliation, or core banking
* Knowledge of performance and load testing tools (e.g. Gatling, k6, JMeter)
* Experience working with vendor or supplier delivery models
* Experience in a regulated financial or payments environment

*Behaviours*

* Quality champion — passionate about getting things right, not just fast
* Detail-oriented and methodical, especially in high-stakes financial contexts
* Strong communicator who can articulate quality risks to both technical and business audiences
* Proactive and self-driven — able to identify gaps and take initiative to address them independently
* Collaborative, working closely with a small team and external suppliers

**Education**  

Bsc in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field. An ISTQB certification (or similar) is a plus.

**Languages**  

Fluent English is required for this role. Fluent Swedish is not a hard requirement, but is desirable as Swedish is the language spoken locally in the team and will make day-to-day collaboration easier.

##### **We Offer**

* A key role in building and shaping a modern, cloud-native core ledger platform
* A collaborative, cross-functional team environment with short decision paths
* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Flexible working arrangements with hybrid options
* Opportunities for professional development and continuous learning
* A chance to make a real impact in the fintech space across the Nordic market
* Modern office in central Borås with a strong team culture
